reasoning: Provide a concise summary of the article, capturing the appointment, the candidate’s background, additional coaching responsibilities, and the quotes/statements.
output: Sussex have appointed a 33-year-old former seamer to take over from Charlotte Burton after assisting her last season and while juggling coaching duties at Brighton College. The new coach, Anyon, took 199 first-class wickets in 63 appearances for Sussex between 2010 and 2014 and retired last year due to a knee injury. He will also coach the women’s under-19 and under-21 sides. He said it is a great opportunity to continue with Sussex and to bring his professional cricket experience to help the girls. Alexia Walker, Sussex’s most-capped women’s player and the under-17 coach, will take on roles with the senior, under-21 and under-19 sides.
